title: chrysanthemum chamomilla
intro: Chrysanthemum chamomilla, also known as the Chinese chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Chrysanthemum chamomilla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried flower remedy, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
